chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 132 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3874/2024 (C/A) 10.09.2024 Petitioner Mujeeb-ur-Rehman, present in person. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for alleged contemnor. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Compliance report is filed on behalf of alleged contemnor, taken on record. Seemingly, all the grievances, whatever was pending before the respondents, have been decided. This petition was disposed of vide order dated 21.05.2024 holding the petition as not maintainable under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, and the contempt is not made. Accordingly, the listed application is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
